justification.Recall@K: Recall@10=1.0000. Relevant chunks in top-10 divided by total relevant chunks in the full pool. Expected sources: ['macro', 'tickers'].
justification.MRR: MRR=1.0000. Average reciprocal rank across all relevant chunks in results. Low MRR means relevant chunks are consistently ranked low.

retrieved_chunks.text: Current market regime: RISK_ON. Risk-on: VIX at 23.9, positive yield curve (0.52pp spread), inflation within range. Conditions favour growth equities and risk assets.

Broad market 30-day: S&P 500 negative 4.02 percent over 30 days; Nasdaq-100 negative 4.10 percent over 30 days; Russell 2000 negative 3.83 percent over 30 days. Small-cap outperforming large-cap — breadth expansion signal.
CPI inflation is 2.66 percent YoY, near the Fed's target. Unemployment rate is 4.3 percent. GDP growth last quarter was 0.7 percent annualised (expansion).

30-day sector leaders: Energy (positive 6.13 percent), Utilities (negative 1.28 percent), Materials (negative 2.48 percent). Laggards: Healthcare (negative 6.14 percent), Industrials (negative 6.67 percent), Consumer Discretionary (negative 6.89 percent). Defensive sector leadership — bearish signal for broader market.
